# WPLP-80 Lite Full Results fixture

`package-contract-v2-wplp80-lite-full-results.json` exists to test the complete package-first v2 individual-results path:

import → publish/readiness → assign → complete → score → Individual Results rendering.

It keeps the compact WPLP-80 Lite question and scoring footprint, but adds richer output/report bindings and narrative-grade explanation payloads so dashboard cards and report sections render with meaningful content instead of minimal fallback text.

Use the original `package-contract-v2-wplp80-lite.json` for minimal structural checks, and this fixture for end-to-end result-content testing.
